---
name: Documentation improvement
about: Suggest edits or additions to existing docs
title: '[Docs] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## What needs to change?
Describe the doc(s) and what should be updated or added.

## Current state
- File(s): 
- Section or issue (e.g. "Scenario 2 is unclear", "Missing example for X"):

## Proposed change
- New or revised text, structure, or examples.
- Links to add or fix.

## Reason
Why this change would help (clarity, accuracy, completeness).
